{{Quote|Welcome to the Diplomatic Vessel ''Chaf Envoy''. I am Chaf'ees'aklaio, aide to Aristocra Chaf'orm'bintrano. I would be honored if you would call me by my core name, Feesa.|Chaf'ees'aklaio|<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />}}
'''Chaf'ees'aklaio''', known by her [[Core name/Legends|core name]] of '''Feesa''', was a member of the [[Chaf family/Legends|Chaf family]], and the second niece and [[Aide/Legends|aide]] of [[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]], core name "Formbi". Along with the Aristocra, she was onboard the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] vessel ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' that took [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] to ''[[Outbound Flight]]'', an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] vessel that had crashed in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], a nebula which was the last defense of the Chiss people.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

She served bravely during the [[Expedition to Outbound Flight|expedition]] – she was wounded by the [[Vagaari/Legends|Vagaari]] when they revealed themselves. She was also responsible for carrying out some of Formbi's plans for duping the Vagaari so the Chiss could attack them.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

{{Chiss-stub}}
